question: Design a `Time` class with private `hour`, `minute`, and `second` integer members. Provide public setter methods (`setHour`, `setMinute`, `setSecond`) that validate the input to ensure it falls within valid ranges (e.g., hour 0-23).

test_cases.input: Time t; t.setHour(10); t.setMinute(20); t.setSecond(30); t.setHour(24); t.setMinute(-5); t.setSecond(60); t.setHour(23); t.setMinute(59); t.setSecond(59);
test_cases.expected:
Initial time: 00:00:00

Test Case 1: Setting valid time (10:20:30)
Hour set to 10 successfully.
Minute set to 20 successfully.
Second set to 30 successfully.
Current time: 10:20:30

Test Case 2: Attempting to set invalid time (24:-5:60)
Attempting to set hour to 24: Failed (as expected). Hour remains 10.
Attempting to set minute to -5: Failed (as expected). Minute remains 20.
Attempting to set second to 60: Failed (as expected). Second remains 30.
Current time after invalid attempts: 10:20:30

Test Case 3: Setting edge case values (23:59:59)
Current time: 23:59:59
